dict.string: WhisperInput records your voice when you hold the global hotkey (⌥Space), then sends the audio to OpenAI's Whisper API for transcription. The recording is deleted immediately after transcription and is never stored on this device.

WhisperInput uses Accessibility access to register a global keyboard shortcut (⌥Space by default) and to paste transcribed text into the active application using simulated keyboard input. It does not monitor or record your keystrokes.
